Questions About Our Health-Focused Meal Delivery?","faqItems":[{"id":"GC-Homepage-item1","title":"What meal options are available with Green Chef?","content":"Green Chef delivers thoughtfully curated meal kits that support the way you eat, including plant based, keto, gluten-free, dairy-free, and more options. Whether you're focused on wellness, protein intake, or convenience, our weekly meal deliveries make it easy to find meals that fit your routine."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item2","title":"Does Green Chef offer organic meal kits?","content":"Green Chef is proud to be the first CCOF-certified organic meal kit company. We send organic produce, responsibly sourced proteins and sustainably sourced seafood."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item3","title":"Can I customize my meal plan?","content":"Yes! Green Chef gives you full control to personalize your meal kit each week. You can easily swap proteins, double your veggies, or double your protein—up to 50 grams per serving. You can also add plant-based proteins, like non-GMO tofu and organic tempeh, to vegetarian and vegan meals for extra flexibility."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item4","title":"Are there meals for specific dietary needs and lifestyles?","content":"Green Chef’s meal delivery service is built to support how you eat. Our plans include options designed for Mediterranean-inspired eating, lower-calorie and high-protein goals, gut and brain health support, and more. You can filter meals each week to match your preferences and dietary needs—making it easier to stick with your goals while enjoying the convenience of healthy food delivery at home."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item5","title":"Is Green Chef safe for people with allergies or dietary restrictions?","content":"Green Chef offers meal kits that can support a range of dietary restrictions. However, all meals are prepared in facilities that also process major allergens like milk, eggs, wheat, soy, and nuts. Every recipe includes a full ingredient list, so if you have a food allergy or strict dietary restriction, we recommend reviewing meal details carefully before ordering."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item6","title":"Do I have to commit long-term to Green Chef? Can I skip weeks?","content":"Green Chef’s meal kit subscription is fully flexible. No long-term commitment is required—you can skip a week, pause, or cancel anytime before your weekly cutoff. It’s a meal delivery service designed to fit your routine."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item7","title":"Can I add more than just dinner to my meal delivery?","content":"Yes! In addition to our meal kits, Green Chef offers a variety of add-ons to complement your weekly delivery. Choose from ready-to-eat, protein-packed breakfasts like egg bites, superfood granola, and Ready-to-Blend smoothies—perfect for grab-and-go mornings. It’s a simple way to add more variety and convenience to your healthy food routine."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item8","title":"How do my meal kits stay fresh during transit?","content":"We use insulated packaging and cooling materials that are seasonally adjusted to ensure your meal kits arrive fresh and ready to cook. Our meal delivery system is designed to maintain quality from our kitchen to your doorstep, so you can feel confident about every ingredient."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item9","title":"How does Green Chef handle meal kit deliveries?","content":"Green Chef delivers your meal kits in recyclable, climate-conscious packaging that keeps everything cool until you're ready to cook: our food boxes, liners, and meal kit bags are all made from recyclable materials (curbside in most areas), and our packaging is seasonally adjusted to protect freshness. After cooking, simply collapse the box and recycle it with your regular pickup — fast, convenient, and eco-friendly."},{"id":"GC-Homepage-item10","title":"Is it easy to cook Green Chef meals?","content":"Yes. Green Chef meal kits are designed to make cooking easy, even on your busiest days. We deliver pre-measured, pre-chopped, and pre-prepped ingredients, along with custom, premium sauces—so there’s less work and more flavor in every dish. Most recipes come together in about 30 minutes with simple, step-by-step instructions that keep mealtime stress-free."}]},"contentType":"frequentlyAskedQuestionsSection"},{"fields":{"id":"HowItWorksGreenchef-HomepageT\u0026C_BAU","footerDisclaimer":"1.For limited time on select recipes \u003cbr\u003e\n2.
